success_criteria: normalize_for_speech never sees bracket characters from vibe tags — strip_vibe_tags runs BEFORE normalization on the non-expressive path
Trailing tags like '[alert] [serious]' are fully removed (brackets AND words) for non-expressive models
Inline tags like 'hello [serious] world' are fully removed for non-expressive models
Leading tags continue to work as before (no regression)
Expressive path preserves tags at any position through normalization (for future re-enablement)
